2024-07-12.thesis: Bipartisan ADVANCE Act nuclear bill signed into law
2024-07-12.exit_case: ADVANCE Act was already signed into law this same week; catalyst fully public, priced into SMR/NuScale immediately.
2024-07-12.assessment: Entered on the exact date of signing, which means the discrete legal catalyst is already resolved and public. Per rule, catalyst_resolved=true forces thesis_live=false even though the stock is rallying — the rally is the market pricing the already-known event, not anticipation. No pending vote/approval/implementation-specific trigger remains that isn't already known (NRC rulemaking timelines are diffuse, multi-year, and not a single re-tradable catalyst).
2024-07-12.exit_advice: Exit now. The signing is the entire catalyst and it already happened (signed 7/9); stocks like NuScale/SMR jumped same-day on the news, meaning the specific event-driven edge is gone at entry. Any further move is generic nuclear-theme momentum/hype (uranium prices, AI-power narrative), not this discrete catalyst. Do not hold expecting a second re-rating from the same bill.
